title: Eye on the Competition
scenario: Create a table comparing the features of three different camera models: the Canon EOS 5D, the Nikon D850, and the Sony Alpha a7R IV. The table should include columns for price, megapixels, video resolution, and lens mount. The output should be a 120-word markdown table that can be copied and pasted into a Google Sheets document.
constraints: Must include a header row with column names
Must include at least 3 camera models

evaluationCriteria.description: The output should be correct Markdown syntax and can be copied and pasted into a Google Sheets document.
The table should accurately compare the features of the three camera models.
The table should include clear labels for each column and row.
